    Index

    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values

    C

    chat.app - package chat.app
    Swing UI for the chat application.
    chat.protocol - package chat.protocol
    Text-based wire protocol and client/server-facing abstractions.
    chat.server - package chat.server
    Server-side components of the chat application.
    ChatApp - Class in chat.app
    Swing-based reference UI for the simple chat application.
    ChatApp() - Constructor for class chat.app.ChatApp
     
    ChatClient - Class in chat.app
    Chat client logic: networking, protocol parsing, and callbacks to ChatView.
    ChatClient(ChatView) - Constructor for class chat.app.ChatClient
    Creates a new client bound to a ChatView implementation.
    ChatServer - Class in chat.server
    Minimal multi-client TCP chat server.
    ChatServer(int) - Constructor for class chat.server.ChatServer
    Creates a server that will listen on the given TCP port.
    ChatView - Interface in chat.app
    UI/frontend contract for receiving events from the chat client.
    ClientSession - Class in chat.protocol
    Stateful protocol handler for a single client connection.
    ClientSession(Backend) - Constructor for class chat.protocol.ClientSession
    Creates a new session bound to a backend implementation.
    connect(String, int) - Method in class chat.app.ChatClient
    Connects to the server but does not log in.
